info.title: IronCircle API
info.description:
IronCircle is a self-hostable, fitness-focused community platform API inspired by Reddit-style forums. Users form or join Circles (communities), create Posts with file attachments, write Comments with one-level threading, Vote on content, Flag inappropriate material, and optionally generate AI-powered TL;DR summaries.

Built with Symfony 6.4, MongoDB, and a DDD + CQRS architecture.

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Content creation and management within circles

tags.name: Votes
tags.description: Upvote and downvote system for posts and comments

tags.name: Moderation
tags.description: Content flagging, review queue, and resolution

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Full-text search across circles, posts, and users

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin-only user and circle management panel

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from `POST /auth/login`. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

limitParam.name: limit
limitParam.description: Maximum number of items to return.

offsetParam.name: offset
offsetParam.description: Number of items to skip before starting to return results.

BadRequest.description: Validation error — one or more fields are invalid.

example.message: Title must be between 3 and 255 characters
JWT token not found
Access denied

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

example.message: Resource with the given ID was not found

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with an existing resource.

example.message: A resource with this identifier already exists

examples: Circle with ID 665f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d was not found

total.description: Total number of matching items across all pages.

token.description: JWT access token. Include in subsequent requests as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

AdminUser.description: Extended user representation exposed only to admins. Includes email.

examples: A circle for discussing powerlifting techniques, programs, and competition prep.
A circle for discussing powerlifting techniques, programs, and competition prep.
Advanced powerlifting circle for experienced lifters. Programs, peaking, and meet prep.
My 12-week peaking program for a 500lb deadlift
Here is the full breakdown of my 12-week peaking cycle leading up to my first sanctioned meet. I pulled 500lb at 181 bodyweight...
My 12-week peaking program for a 500lb deadlift
Here is the full breakdown of my 12-week peaking cycle leading up to my first sanctioned meet...
Updated with meet results. Hit all 9 lifts and totaled 1350 at 181...

parentCommentId.description: ID of the parent comment for replies. Null for top-level comments.

examples: Great program breakdown. How did you manage fatigue in weeks 9-11?
Great program breakdown. How did you manage fatigue in weeks 9-11?

parentCommentId.description: Must reference a top-level comment. Replies to replies are rejected.

examples: Updated: great program. Would love to see your accessory work too.
Promoting unsafe lifting practices without proper disclaimers.

status.description: `approved` = resolved (flag was valid), `rejected` = dismissed (flag was invalid).

resolvedById.description: ID of the moderator/admin who resolved or dismissed the flag.

examples: Promoting unsafe lifting practices without proper disclaimers.

A 12-week peaking program designed for an intermediate lifter targeting a 500lb deadlift at 181lb bodyweight, featuring progressive overload with strategic deloads in weeks 4, 8, and a taper through week 12.

model.description: Identifier of the AI model used for generation.

SearchUser.description: User representation in search results. Email is deliberately excluded.

post.description: Creates a new user account with `ROLE_MEMBER` assigned by default.

example.message: User registered successfully
A user with this username already exists

post.description: Validates credentials and returns a JWT access token for subsequent authenticated requests.

example.message: Invalid username or password

post.description: Creates a new circle. The authenticated user becomes the creator and first moderator. A URL-safe slug is auto-generated from the name.

409.description: Circle name or slug already exists.

example.message: A circle with this name already exists

get.description: Returns public circles for anonymous users. Authenticated users also see private circles where they are creator or moderator.

parameters.name: public_only
parameters.description: When true, returns only public circles regardless of authentication.

get.description: Public circles are accessible to anyone. Private circles require the requester to be the creator, a moderator, or an admin.

put.description: Full replacement of circle name and description. Requires creator, moderator, or admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the circle and cascades to all posts, attachments (files and records), and comments. Requires creator or admin role.

example.message: Circle deleted successfully

patch.description: Toggle between public and private. Requires creator or admin role.

post.summary: Create a post in a circle
post.description: Creates a new post within the specified circle. Requires authentication and access to the circle.

get.description: Returns posts ordered by creation date (newest first). Attachments are embedded in each post.
Returns post with embedded attachments. Public circle posts are accessible to anyone.

put.description: Full replacement of post title and content. Requires author, circle moderator/creator, or admin.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the post and cascades to all attachments (files removed from disk + records deleted) and comments.

example.message: Post deleted successfully

patch.summary: Toggle AI summary flag on post
patch.description: Enables or disables AI summary generation for this post. Only the post author can toggle this — no moderator override.

get.summary: Get cached AI summary for a post
get.description: Returns the cached AI-generated summary. Requires the post's `aiSummaryEnabled` to be `true`. Returns 400 if disabled, 404 if not yet generated.

400.description: AI summary not enabled on this post.

example.message: AI summary is not enabled for this post

post.summary: Generate AI summary for a post
post.description: Triggers synchronous summary generation via HuggingFace Inference API using `facebook/bart-large-cnn`. Returns the cached summary if one already exists. Requires `aiSummaryEnabled` to be `true` on the post.

200.description: Summary generated or returned from cache.

400.description: AI summary not enabled on this post.

example.message: AI summary is not enabled for this post

503.description: AI provider unavailable or model is loading.

example.message: AI summary generation failed. The model may be loading — try again shortly.

post.description: Uploads a file and attaches it to the post. Allowed MIME types: `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/gif`, `image/webp`, `application/pdf`, `application/msword`, `application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document`, `text/plain`. Maximum file size: 10 MB.

400.description: Invalid file type or size exceeds 10 MB.

example.message: File type not allowed. Accepted: jpeg, png, gif, webp, pdf, doc, docx, txt

get.description: Returns the raw file content inline via `BinaryFileResponse`. The `Content-Type` header matches the stored MIME type.

delete.description: Removes the file from disk and deletes the record. Requires being the attachment author, post author, circle moderator/creator, or admin.

example.message: Attachment deleted successfully

post.description: Creates a comment on the specified post. One level of threading is supported — set `parentCommentId` to reply to a top-level comment. Replies to replies are rejected with 400.

400.description: Validation error or nested reply attempt.

example.message: Replies to replies are not allowed. Only top-level comments can be replied to.

put.description: Full replacement of comment content. Requires author, circle moderator/creator, or admin.

delete.description: Requires author, circle moderator/creator, or admin.

example.message: Comment deleted successfully

post.description: Upsert semantics — if a vote already exists for the same user and target, its value is updated. Authors cannot vote on their own content (`SELF_VOTING` error).

400.description: Self-voting attempt or invalid vote value.

example.message: You cannot vote on your own content

delete.description: Removes the authenticated user's vote from the specified target.

example.message: Vote retracted successfully

404.description: No vote found for this user and target.

example.message: Vote not found

post.description: Flags a post or comment for moderator review. A user cannot flag the same target twice — duplicate check spans all statuses (pending, approved, rejected).

409.description: User has already flagged this target.

example.message: You have already flagged this content

get.description: Returns flags with `pending` status for moderator/admin review.

patch.description: Marks the flag as `approved` — indicates the flagged content violated rules. Requires moderator or admin role.

409.description: Flag has already been resolved or dismissed.

example.message: This flag has already been actioned

patch.description: Marks the flag as `rejected` — indicates the flag was invalid. Requires moderator or admin role.

409.description: Flag has already been resolved or dismissed.

example.message: This flag has already been actioned

get.description: Returns posts across accessible circles ordered by creation date (newest first). Anonymous users see posts from public circles only. Authenticated users see posts from public circles plus circles where they are creator or moderator.
Returns posts from a specific circle ordered by creation date. Private circles require authentication and membership.
Case-insensitive regex search on circle name and description. Respects visibility rules — anonymous users see only public circles.
Case-insensitive regex search on post title and content. Scoped to circles accessible by the requester.
Case-insensitive regex search on username. Email is deliberately not exposed in search results.
Returns all users with email included. Requires `ROLE_ADMIN`.
Returns full user details including email. Requires `ROLE_ADMIN`.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user. Users with `ROLE_ADMIN` cannot be deleted — returns 403. Requires `ROLE_ADMIN`.

example.message: User deleted successfully

403.description: Not an admin or attempting to delete an admin user.

example.message: Cannot delete a user with ROLE_ADMIN

patch.description: Replaces the user's roles. Each role must be one of `ROLE_ADMIN`, `ROLE_MODERATOR`, or `ROLE_MEMBER`. At least one role is required. Requires `ROLE_ADMIN`.

422.description: One or more role values are invalid.

example.message: Invalid role: ROLE_SUPERADMIN. Allowed: ROLE_ADMIN, ROLE_MODERATOR, ROLE_MEMBER

get.description: Returns all circles regardless of visibility. Requires `ROLE_ADMIN`.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a circle regardless of creator. Cascades to all posts, attachments (files removed from disk + records deleted), and comments. Requires `ROLE_ADMIN`.

example.message: Circle force-deleted successfully
